creator: The AI Advantage
primary_format: long-form YouTube AI tutorial & news (5-20 min) with secondary vertical Shorts
topics: AI tool tutorials (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Nano Banana, Claude Code)
Weekly news roundups ('AI News You Can Use')
visual_signatures: Heavy use of tier cards, callout pills, big-number splashes
Screen-recording overlays with animated arrow callouts and highlight boxes
Talking-head intro/outro framed in lower-right with branded ID strip
Bold sans-serif typography with strong color blocks (often dark navy + accent)
